description: The main entrance block for the homepage. Combines a punchy, multi-line heading with rich social proof, primary/secondary action buttons, and a collage of three overlapping, slightly rotated photos plus a floating yellow sticker.

fields.description: Small introductory text shown above the main heading (e.g., 'Xin chào!').
fields.name: badge_text
fields.title: Badge Text

fields.description: The first line of the large hero title. Supports HTML entities.
fields.name: heading_line1
fields.title: Heading Line 1 (HTML allowed)

fields.description: A single word highlighted in the theme's red color. Include a trailing space if followed by more text.
fields.name: heading_accent
fields.title: Heading Accent Word (red)

fields.description: Text that appears immediately after the red accent word on the second line.
fields.name: heading_line2_after
fields.title: Heading Line 2 After Accent

fields.description: Text that appears on the third line, before the final underlined word.
fields.name: heading_line3_before
fields.title: Heading Line 3 Before Underlined Word

fields.description: The final word in the heading that will have a yellow brush-stroke underline effect.
fields.name: heading_underlined
fields.title: Underlined Word

fields.description: Supporting descriptive text shown below the main title. Aim for 2-3 lines.
fields.name: subheading
fields.title: Subheading

fields.description: The large primary action button for the main conversion goal.
fields.name: cta_primary
fields.title: Primary CTA

fields.description: The secondary outline button for alternative paths (e.g., 'Meet the Crew').
fields.name: cta_secondary
fields.title: Secondary CTA

fields.description: The bold part of the social proof indicator (e.g., '2,400+ travelers').
fields.name: social_proof_strong
fields.title: Social Proof (bold)

fields.description: Supporting text for the social proof line (e.g., '· Rated 4.9 on TripAdvisor').
fields.name: social_proof_rest
fields.title: Social Proof (rest)

fields.description: Text for the floating circular yellow badge (e.g., '100% local-guided').
fields.name: sticker_text
fields.title: Floating Sticker Text

fields.description: Largest hero photo, rotated +1.5° in the top-right slot. Portrait or square 4:5 works best — people, food, motion.
fields.name: hero_image
fields.title: Hero Image (main)

fields.description: Smaller photo overlapping the bottom-left, rotated -3°. Landscape/wide composition.
fields.name: secondary_image
fields.title: Secondary Image (bottom-left)

fields.description: Smallest accent photo rotated +6° on the mid-right. Tight crop or square.
fields.name: tertiary_image
fields.title: Tertiary Image (mid-right)

name: Home Hero

hero_image.alt: Vietnamese grandma preparing bún chả in her Hanoi kitchen

secondary_image.alt: Golden rice terraces at sunset in Sapa

test_data.subheading: Small-group food crawls, mountain loops, and cooking classes — all run by locals who actually live here. No buses. No bullhorns. Just your new favorite country.

tertiary_image.alt: Smiling local picking tea leaves on a Vietnamese hillside
